userKey.description: Unique user identifier in the Customer's system.

url.description: Unique web address to which the user should be redirected to verify their identity.

additionalProperties.description: Links to 3rd party API that allow to collect data directly from 3rd party API. Available in specific strategies.

externalLinks.description: Links to 3rd party API that allow to collect data directly from 3rd party API. Available in specific strategies.
